note: Lyric-driven promo-scene designs for the 15 songs that currently fall back to the mainstage loop. Generated by the design-song-scenes workflow (text only, no image/video credits spent). Use these when credits refill: feed the `scene` into the Seedream edit pipeline with the listed `refs` (kiki=public/assets/ref/kiki.jpg, dieter=.../dieter.jpg, crew=.../crew.jpg) wrapped with KEEP + STYLE + NEG, then animate. We only need videos for the STANDOUTS, not all 15. The variety-critic notes below flag near-duplicates to fix before generating.

scenes.title: Tractor Beam Takeoff
scenes.gag: Dieter "beams up" Kiki with a green glowstick like a remote control while she floats bouncing in zero-G, champagne droplets and all
scenes.scene: A giant chrome flying saucer has crashed halfway through the nightclub ceiling and is blasting a fat cone of glowing green tractor-beam light straight down onto the dancefloor, thick with laser haze and drifting gold confetti. KIKI, in her silver sequin crop-top-and-hot-pants two-piece, floats a few feet off the floor inside the green beam in gleeful zero gravity — platinum hair standing straight up, one arm flung skyward, a champagne flute and its escaping weightless golden droplets bobbing beside her as she squeals mid-abduction. Directly below, DJ DIETER points a single glowing green glowstick up at her like a TV remote, his other hand planted on the decks. The crowd behind is an energetic backlit dark silhouette of super-fans jumping with arms thrown up, reaching toward the beam.

scenes.title: Fangs Out, SPF On
scenes.gag: A vampire's giant novelty bottle of "SPF 50" sunscreen standing proudly on the coffin DJ booth like a champagne magnum — sunrise insurance mid-neck-bite.
scenes.scene: A dry-ice-fogged Gothic castle dungeon converted into a rave — dripping stone arches, wrought-iron candelabra, cobwebs, and a giant open wooden coffin repurposed as the glowing DJ booth, cold pale-blue moonlight beams slicing through green laser haze. DJ DIETER leans out over the coffin decks with a red-lined satin vampire cape flaring off his shoulders and plastic fangs bared, lunging mouth-first toward KIKI G's neck while one hand still grips the mixer's crossfader. KIKI, with a black lace choker shoved aside, throws her head back in a theatrical swoon — one hand pressed to her neck, the other hoisting a martini glass of glowing red "plasma" cocktail — beside a comically oversized novelty bottle of "SPF 50" sunscreen standing upright on the coffin like a champagne magnum. Behind them a packed crowd of backlit dark silhouettes jumps with arms up, rubber bats on strings swing through black-and-silver confetti.

scenes.title: The Night Is Over But The Bass Is Loud
scenes.gag: Dieter DJing from the roof of the getaway taxi at sunrise, still in his night-shades, handing out a jug of water for "hydration" while the dead club pours into the street to keep dancing.
scenes.scene: The exact moment the afterparty spills OUT of a trashed nightclub onto an empty city street at pale pink-and-orange DAWN, the club's ugly white houselights blazing through the open doorway with a bored janitor silhouette on a mop, first sliver of sun cresting the rooftops. DJ DIETER has dragged his turntables up onto the ROOF of a waiting yellow taxi and spins from up there, still wearing his wraparound night-sunglasses as the sun rises, one hand on the platter and the other thrusting a big plastic water jug down toward the crowd like a deranged hydration coach. KIKI struts off the curb into the street belting the chorus into a glittery handheld mic, her other hand tossing a farewell wave back at the emptying club. The LEOPARD TRIO shimmy on the sidewalk and a dense pack of backlit dark crowd silhouettes jump in the dawn street with arms up, amid confetti, toppled champagne bottles, a rolling disco ball and a flustered taxi driver.

scenes.title: Put It On My Tab
scenes.gag: Kiki smashing a champagne flute under her heel mid-table-dance while Dieter calmly holds up a gold card and a mile-long "put it on my tab" receipt.
scenes.scene: A packed 2002 VIP bottle-service booth drowning in gold — mirror-ball spray, green laser haze, an ice bucket of toppled champagne bottles, spilled glitter and sparklers. KIKI, in platinum heels, is mid-stomp DANCING ON the champagne-soaked VIP table, arms flung triumphantly overhead, glitter raining from her hair, glossy mascara streaked down her cheeks in "expensive" rivers, as a champagne flute SHATTERS under her heel and sprays wine and glass shards mid-air. DIETER lounges at the table's edge with a greasy grin — one hand holding up a gold credit card, the other letting an absurdly long paper bar-tab receipt unspool to the sticky floor. THE LEOPARD TRIO jump and hurl their drinks, framed by a wall of backlit dark-silhouette crowd with arms up.

scenes.title: Two Hands On The Hose (Station 138)
scenes.gag: Dieter white-knuckling a wildly bucking, gushing fire hose with both hands while Kiki slides down the brass firepole through the spray
scenes.scene: A fire-station engine bay converted into a strobing disco — a glossy red fire engine as the DJ booth, a disco ball where the alarm bell should be, a big illuminated "STATION 138" sign, everything drenched in spinning red emergency light, green laser haze, sprinkler-rain and smoke. DIETER stands wide-legged in enormous yellow rubber fireman's boots and bright red suspenders over his leather jacket, gripping a giant brass-nozzled fire hose with BOTH hands as it bucks and blasts a huge white arc of water and foam over the crowd, greasy grin at camera. KIKI, in a tiny red plastic fire helmet, is caught mid-slide down a gleaming brass firepole beside him, one hand clamped on the pole and legs kicked out, shrieking through the spray. A red hydrant gushes at the pole's base while a backlit silhouette crowd of drenched fans jumps with arms up.

scenes.title: Code Blue in the Disco
scenes.gag: Dieter defibrillating the fainted "sickest girl in disco town" back to life on a dancefloor gurney while a champagne IV drips into her arm and the heart monitor flatlines into a bassline.
scenes.scene: A packed 2002 nightclub redressed as a neon emergency room — a glowing red "WAITING ROOM: FULL" cross sign, laser haze, and a chrome wheeled hospital gurney dead-center on the dancefloor in front of a giant EKG heart-monitor screen whose green heartbeat line spikes into a pulsing soundwave. KIKI is swooned dramatically backward across the gurney, the back of one hand to her forehead in a mock-fainting fever, an IV drip bag full of gold champagne taped to her arm and bubbling into a tube. DIETER leans over her as the sleazy disco-doctor — open white lab coat over bare chest and gold chain, wraparound shades, blue latex gloves — gripping two defibrillator paddles (five normal fingers each) mid-"CLEAR!", a comically oversized glowing syringe labeled "BEAT" and a €5000 clipboard bill on a chrome tray. THE LEOPARD TRIO are euphoric disco-nurses; behind them a crowd of backlit dark silhouettes throw their arms up like frantic patients.

scenes.title: Insert Your Floppy Disk
scenes.gag: Dieter sleazily inserting a giant floppy disk into the glowing heart-shaped disk-drive slot on Kiki's sequin chest while her BATTERY LOW gauge blinks and sparks fly
scenes.scene: A sweaty 2002 Eurodance club where the DJ booth is a teetering stack of beige Y2K CRT monitors and a giant cardboard computer tower flashing "REBOOT" in green pixel text, drenched in laser haze and gold light. KIKI stands center on a glowing podium, a big heart-shaped floppy DISK-DRIVE SLOT lit hot pink mounted on her chest, a comic "BATTERY LOW" gauge blinking red on her hip and two red jumper-cable clamps clipped to her waistband, mouth open squeaky mid-belt with one hand gripping a sparkly handheld mic (five fingers). DJ DIETER leans in sleazily beside her, both hands (five fingers each) shoving an absurdly oversized neon-blue 3.5-inch floppy disk into the glowing heart-slot on her chest as sparks spray from the seam, a thick tangled power cord snaking from the monitor-stack decks to an enormous floor plug. Behind them a hyped crowd of backlit dark silhouettes jump with arms up.

scenes.title: Kiki: The Beautiful Torpedo
scenes.gag: Kiki launched horizontally across the dance floor as an actual human torpedo — hair blasted straight back, arms pointed like a warhead — while Dieter points admiringly at her flight path
scenes.scene: A packed 2002 Eurodance club with a giant glowing hot-pink neon sign reading "SHAMELESS" above the floor. KIKI G is captured mid-flight, launched horizontally across the floor like a human torpedo — body streamlined and dead level a metre off the ground, both arms locked straight out front with fingers pressed together, platinum hair blasted straight backward by a wind machine, sequins throwing hard sparkle, cheeks puffed with speed. DJ DIETER stands at the decks, one hand flat on the crossfader, the other arm flung out pointing along her flight path with a greasy proud grin. The three super-fans duck and throw their arms up as she rockets over their heads, screaming. Behind them a backlit silhouette crowd jumps with arms overhead and champagne arcs through the air.
scenes.criticNote: The variety critic flags this as the weakest / least on-song: the torpedo gag isn't tied to 'shame' and reuses the luxury-car wind-blasted-Kiki pose. Suggested reset: Kiki strutting a paparazzi RED-CARPET gauntlet totally unbothered past a wall of flashing cameras under a tabloid 'SHAMELESS!' headline, Dieter spinning from a podium of scandal magazines.

scenes.title: Riding Shotgun, Pinning the Needle
scenes.gag: Kiki rides shotgun with her hand clamped firmly on the tall chrome stick shift while the giant speedometer needle pins to max — Dieter's shameless gold-chrome sports-car joyride
scenes.scene: A neon-drenched elevated overpass at night, purple-and-cyan laser haze, wet reflective asphalt, long motion-blur light streaks screaming past for speed. Dead center, a gaudy cherry-red-with-gold-chrome Italian convertible blasts down the fast lane, its ludicrous dashboard-mounted chrome SPEEDOMETER prop with an oversized needle pinned hard against the max peg. DJ DIETER is behind the wheel leaning way back with a greasy grin, gold chain swinging, one hand draped lazily over the wheel, jacket flapping. KIKI rides shotgun, buckled in a seatbelt, platinum hair blasted dead-straight back by a wind machine, mouth open in a delighted scream, one hand thrown to the sky and the other five fingers gripping the tall chrome gear-stick knob mid-shift; the three super-fans are crammed euphorically into the tiny back seat with arms up, and along the railing a backlit crowd of dark jumping silhouettes throws its arms up as champagne spray catches the lasers.

scenes.title: Polish the Brass Cannon (It Is Fully Loaded)
scenes.gag: Sleazy Captain Dieter steers the decks while lovingly polishing a giant brass cannon that erupts champagne, as Kiki heaves an absurd oversized anchor into the glowing "deep blue sea" fog
scenes.scene: A 2002 Eurodance nightclub rebuilt as the deck of a cheesy naval battleship — a giant chrome ship's steering wheel doubles as the DJ booth, rope rigging and fishing nets overhead, a towering fairy-light mast into glowing blue sea-fog, a wet mirror-shine "slippery deck" floor, gold trim, champagne spraying. DIETER, in a white gold-braided captain's peaked cap tilted over his sunglasses, stands at the decks with one hand gripping the huge chrome ship's wheel and the other buffing an enormous polished BRASS CANNON with a chamois rag, greasy grin, as the cannon erupts a fat geyser of champagne foam and gold confetti. KIKI, in a tiny white sailor hat, is caught mid-strut heaving a comically oversized glittering anchor on a thick rope over the deck edge into glowing blue fog while belting into a chrome bullhorn megaphone. Three euphoric super-fans in sailor-collar two-pieces salute and jump; a packed backlit crowd of dark silhouettes flings arms up in a bobbing sea of tiny sailor hats.
scenes.criticNote: One of four scenes (with mechanic/synth/tutti-frutti) using the same 'Dieter proudly hoists one giant phallic prop' staging. Vary his action: let the cannon RECOIL and blast him backward off the deck.

scenes.title: Get Under My Hood
scenes.gag: Dieter rolls out from under Kiki's lifted chrome car on a mechanic's creeper, hoisting an absurdly oversized wrench like a trophy — his "biggest wrench" for her loose nuts.
scenes.scene: A grimy 2002 auto-repair garage reborn as a pulsing Eurodance club — a buzzing hot-pink-and-chrome "MECHANIC" neon sign, oil-stained concrete, laser haze, a fountain of gold sparks from a wall-mounted angle grinder. KIKI G lounges triumphantly across the hood of a glittering chrome sports car hoisted high on a hydraulic two-post car lift, one stiletto on the bumper, belting into a chrome tire-pressure-gauge microphone while spraying a foaming champagne magnum over the "grease." DJ DIETER, jacket open over a grease-smeared chest, wraparound shades, rolls out from under the raised car flat on a wheeled mechanic's creeper with a greasy grin, one oil-blackened fist clamped (five fingers) around an absurdly oversized shiny chrome wrench held up like a trophy, a red dipstick and flashlight in his tool belt. The decks are a tower of stacked tires topped with a chrome engine block; a backlit dark-silhouette crowd of "motorheads" jumps with arms up, revving invisible throttles.
scenes.criticNote: Shares the 'giant phallic prop hoist' staging; suggested variation: pin him under the car with a wrench too heavy to lift.

scenes.title: Caution: Wet Floor
scenes.gag: A yellow CAUTION WET FLOOR sign planted center-dancefloor while Dieter wrings out a soaked towel and Kiki slides shamelessly through the puddles.
scenes.scene: A packed 2002 Eurodance club with a jet-black, mirror-glossy dancefloor that is visibly SOAKING WET — puddles, ripples and neon reflections everywhere — under green laser haze, gold confetti and fog. Dead center stands a bright yellow A-frame CAUTION WET FLOOR sign with the little slipping stick-figure, a mop and bucket toppled beside it. KIKI G is caught mid shameless-slide low across the wet floor, one palm flat and planted (five fingers), the other hand gripping a chrome handheld mic to her open mouth as she belts the hook, hair whipping, sequins throwing laser sparks. DJ DIETER steps off the decks and wrings a sodden white towel with both fists so a rope of water streams onto the puddle, greasy grin at camera. Behind them a wall of backlit DARK-SILHOUETTE super-fans (the leopard trio among them) jump with arms up, a champagne bottle sprays a foaming arc.
scenes.criticNote: Critic suggests redressing the generic club into a specific location (e.g. a just-mopped club RESTROOM / spill-zone with a runaway motorized floor-buffer Kiki surfs) to differentiate from euro-trash.

scenes.title: Your Synthesizer Is So Big
scenes.gag: A three-story modular-synth skyscraper of giant knobs and thick cables while Kiki trampolines mid-air on a giant floor-sized MIDI keyboard
scenes.scene: DJ Dieter's neon-hazed Eurodance "studio," dominated by a single COMICALLY ENORMOUS modular synthesizer that towers three stories high behind the stage — a skyscraper wall of chrome knobs the size of dinner plates, garden-hose-thick gold and neon patch cables everywhere, and a giant glowing MASTER FADER shoved all the way up past a flashing red "DO NOT GO INTO THE RED" zone. DIETER stands proudly at the base gripping and twisting one absurdly giant filter knob with both hands (five fingers each), grinning up at the towering synth as if presenting its size. KIKI is caught mid-bounce leaping high off a giant floor-sized light-up MIDI keyboard whose keys are trampoline pads, one hand to the sky and mouth open mid-lyric, her other hand clutching a thick gold cable stretched taut. The three super-fans bounce on the keyboard too; a backlit dark silhouette crowd throws arms up through champagne spray.
scenes.criticNote: Shares the 'giant prop boast' staging with navy/mechanic/tutti-frutti.

scenes.title: The Very Large Banana
scenes.gag: Dieter singing into an enormous banana like a mic while Kiki squeezes a grapefruit into a jet of juice
scenes.scene: A steamy neon-lit tropical "resort" nightclub, humid with laser haze and gold confetti — a tiki DJ booth built from stacked watermelons, pineapples and coconuts, plastic palm fronds and inflatable fruit dangling overhead, tiki torches flickering. DIETER stands behind the fruit-piled decks: one hand on the platter, the other triumphantly hoisting an ENORMOUS ripe banana up to his mouth like a microphone. KIKI is front and center mid hip-shake, both hands clamped around a giant halved grapefruit and squeezing hard so a bright jet of juice sprays over an overflowing champagne coupe, a glossy pyramid of ripe melons beside her. The crowd is an energetic backlit dark silhouette wall — jumping, arms up, waving inflatable bananas.
scenes.criticNote: Shares the 'giant prop boast' staging; strongest of the four but consider giving Dieter a different action.

scenes.title: Shameless In The Jacuzzi
scenes.gag: Dieter dangles a dripping fondue fork of hot melted cheese over a steaming outdoor jacuzzi in a blizzard while Kiki does the chalet dance clutching a giant prop icicle
scenes.scene: A snow-buried nighttime alpine chalet deck under a fake snow-capped Matterhorn, string lights and green-and-pink laser haze cutting through thick steam billowing off a giant bubbling outdoor jacuzzi, real snow flurries falling, an alpine cowbell on the rail. KIKI G stands waist-deep in the churning, over-frothing hot tub, wet platinum hair slicked back, both arms thrown up mid "chalet dance" — one hand hoisting a spraying champagne bottle, the other clutching a giant clear acrylic prop icicle, snowflakes on her steaming shoulders. DJ DIETER kneels at the snowy tub rim, wraparound shades topped with a ridiculous fuzzy pom-pom bobble hat, leaning over the water with a greasy grin as he dangles a long fondue fork trailing a dripping string of hot melted cheese from a fondue pot on the tub edge. THE LEOPARD TRIO are crammed into the far end of the same steaming jacuzzi, arms up; behind them a backlit dark silhouette crowd of skiers jumps in the snow with ski poles thrown skyward.

collisionsToFix.fix: Same undressed packed-laser-club with no transformed set; keep euro-trash's VIP booth as the one club interior, redress the other two into named locations.
Same 'Dieter hoists one enormous phallic prop' staging 4x; vary his action in most (cannon recoils and blasts him back, wrench pins him under the car, etc.).
Weakest/most off-song; reset as an unbothered paparazzi RED-CARPET strut under a tabloid 'SHAMELESS!' headline.
Both red-emergency 'rescue' fantasies; split the palette — fireman blue/siren, patient-zero green EKG glow.
